skills.description: Privacy compliance — Consent Mode v2, pre-consent firing, tag-level consent mapping, PII scan, GDPR/CCPA/DMA regional compliance
Container governance — tag/trigger/variable naming convention, folder organization, consistency analysis, maintainability scoring
Cross-platform tracking — event parity matrix, ad platform validation (Google Ads/Meta/LinkedIn/TikTok), conversion integrity, remarketing gaps, enhanced conversions
Data layer architecture — variable inventory, ecommerce schema compliance, data flow tracing, Custom JS audit, timing/race conditions
Container health — complete tag inventory, legacy/duplicate detection, environment hygiene, tool inventory, GA4 quality, hardcoded values, bloat assessment
SPA & modern framework — history change detection, double-firing prevention, page path/title accuracy, scroll/engagement reset
Performance & errors — tag firing order impact, Custom HTML audit with load time estimates, blocking scripts, error-prone patterns
Professional resume review — clarity, impact, ATS compatibility, formatting
